## SOK Standards Compliance
- [ ] `[switch]$DryRun` is first parameter in all new/modified scripts
- [ ] KB units used for all size reporting
- [ ] `#Requires -Version 7.0` present
- [ ] `#Requires -RunAsAdministrator` present (if elevation needed)
